## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, …) — it drives the version bump
- [ ] Targets the `staging` branch
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run format:check`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run coverage`, and `npm run build` pass
- [ ] Docs (`README.md`) updated if behavior or API changed
